response.justification: Bogdan presents a highly relevant profile with extensive experience in geospatial data platforms, distributed systems, and high-performance applications. His background as a founder of a Geo-Data platform and experience with C/C++ and other systems languages, coupled with a strong commitment to software craftsmanship, makes him an excellent candidate for the role. While his recent primary language experience isn't C++ or Rust, his systems programming background and proven ability to adapt to new technologies mitigate this concern.
strengths: Extensive experience with geospatial data processing and building geo-data platforms (GISCollective, Green Map).
Proven track record in designing and operating high-performance, distributed systems handling real-time data at scale (Dunnhumby, Kubernetes).
Strong foundation in C/C++ and other systems languages (Dlang), demonstrating adaptability and a rigorous approach to software quality (TDD, CI/CD).
concerns: Most recent primary language experience is with TypeScript/Node.js/Dlang, with C++ experience being older (2014-2015).
Direct experience with 'routing tiling' or 'navigation guidance solutions' is not explicitly detailed, though geospatial experience is strong.
The C++ experience is from an earlier period, potentially requiring an update on modern C++ standards and practices.
